title: pull.bats updates
body: Don't use /tmp for temporary files in `pull.bats`, use the per-test temporary directory.  Use our known registry.conf file when ever we communicate with a registry.  Don't run "mkdir" using the `run` function.  Check the exit status of more commands that we run under `run`.

comments.body: Just two verification questions that are related, otherwise LGTM.  Nice cleanup Nalin.

:pushpin: Commit 12d2541 has been approved by `giuseppe`
